text.title: claude-messages-api Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for claude-messages-api as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: `resp.content` is a `list[ContentBlock]` — content blocks can be `text`, `tool_use`, or `thinking`; always type-check before accessing `.text`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Blind indexing into content[0].text fails when the first block is not text. Check the type first.

failure-mode.description: Streaming with tools: `input_json_delta` events carry partial JSON — you must accumulate and parse after `content_block_stop`, not inline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Partial JSON is not valid; parsing before the block finishes raises JSONDecodeError. Wait for content_block_stop before parsing.

failure-mode.description: Multi-turn history must alternate user/assistant roles strictly — consecutive same-role messages raise a 400 error.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The API validates role alternation. Appending text instead of the full content block breaks this invariant.

failure-mode.description: `stop_sequences` match on the next token boundary — if the model generates a stop sequence mid-sentence, the sentence is cut off without warning.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stop sequences are a hard boundary, not a soft hint. Mid-generation stops lose data without notification.

failure-mode.description: Image URLs in messages are fetched at inference time — if the URL returns a 403 at that moment, the call fails silently with a content error block.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: URL-based access is async. Pre-fetch and base64-encode for reliability.

failure-mode.description: PDF pages exceeding 100 produce an API error, not a truncation — validate before sending.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Over-limit PDFs fail after encoding and transmission. Validate page count first to avoid wasted bandwidth.
